pairing.p1: We match people using our compatibility survey, not swiping behavior.
pairing.p2: Your answers help us understand communication style, social energy, emotional expectations, and how you prefer to spend time with someone. The goal is not just shared interests but natural interaction.
pairing.p3: You are paired with someone you are likely to feel comfortable talking to in real life.

howItWorks.step1: Sign up and complete the compatibility survey
howItWorks.step2: You receive up to 5 weekly matches every Monday at midnight (Zurich time)
howItWorks.step3: Decide by Tuesday 12:00 (Zurich time) whether to like or pass
howItWorks.step4: You receive a date invitation with your match’s photo and details

preview.trigger: What will I know about my match before the date?
preview.bullet2: basic info such as age and university
preview.outro: You get enough information to feel prepared without overanalyzing before meeting.

notMatch.trigger: What if I don’t like my match or the date?
notMatch.p2: Not every meeting becomes romantic. Some become friendships and some are simply one conversation. After the date you give feedback and future matches improve from it.

participants.p1: Right now the active pool is still centered on UZH, ETH, and ZHAW in Zurich.
participants.p2: If your city or campus is not live yet, you can join the Switzerland waitlist and tell us where to launch next.
participants.p3: People who join usually want to meet others in person instead of spending weeks chatting online.

lastMinute.trigger: What if I can’t make it last minute?
lastMinute.p1: Just click the reschedule button in your date confirmation and pick a new time.

duration.trigger: How long does it usually take to get a date?
duration.p1: Usually one to two matching cycles.
duration.p2: We wait for a strong pairing instead of sending random matches quickly.

venues.p1: At locations around campus and trendy venues across Zurich city. Cafés, casual bars, and relaxed spots where conversation feels natural.

noChat.trigger: Why we don’t believe in chatting
noChat.p1: Most connections fade in the talking stage.
noChat.p2: Texting creates expectations and overthinking. Meeting quickly keeps things simple and honest. You understand someone far better in one conversation than in days of messages.

privacy.p1: We only collect information necessary for matching and safety.
privacy.p2: Your data is not sold or used for advertising profiling. You can delete your account at any time and your information will be permanently removed.
